title: carex karoi subsp. selengensis
intro: Carex karoi subsp. selengensis, also known as a type of sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Russia and Mongolia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex karoi subsp. selengensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or made into a tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
